title: The Brief – Von der Leyen rejects Iran sanctions lift
summary_full: The Commission President said that the sanctions were triggered by "the suppression of human rights" and should only be lifted following "fundamental change in Iran"
summary_public: The Commission President said that the sanctions were triggered by "the suppression of human rights" and should only be lifted following "fundamental change in Iran"

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Von der Leyen rejects Iran sanctions lift
